reasoning_model_1:

The pacing is consistent throughout the entire clip, effectively creating the requested drowsy, slow atmosphere.

model_comparison: Model 1 (T1) followed the specific feature control instruction ('extremely slow speed') effectively, producing a 23-second audio with elongated articulation and soothing pauses that match the bedtime context. Model 2 (T2) ignored the speed instruction entirely, producing a standard-speed (or slightly fast) 10-second audio that sounds energetic rather than slow. Although Model 1 had a very minor text omission (missing '你的'), its adherence to the core paralinguistic requirement makes it strictly superior to Model 2, which failed the task.
